allow: PowerShell($env:PATH = $env:PATH + ";C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI"; gh auth status)

PowerShell($cmds = @\('python','python3','py'\); foreach \($c in $cmds\) { $g = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "$c -> $\($g.Source\)" } else { "$c -> \(no encontrado\)" } }; "--- versions ---"; try { & python --version } catch {}; try { & py --version } catch {})
